Name: Captain Fresh
Description:
Captain Fresh is a technology-driven global packaged seafood company.

As a multi-geography, multi-species player, we orchestrate transactions among various stakeholders in the seafood ecosystem. Our products are sold under our house of brands, including CenSea, Koral, Senecrus, ChopServe and Ocean Garden. Our B2B customer base primarily includes distributors (including food service providers) and retailers. During FY 2025, we served 1,291 customers across 34 countries, including the U.S., several countries in Europe, the U.A.E., and India, transacting in more than 90 species of seafood, with our sourcing network spanning 659 suppliers across 35 countries.

Being a digital supply chain orchestrator, the Captain Fresh Digital Operation System (CF DOS) is our proprietary technology purpose-built for the seafood ecosystem, consolidating fragmented supply networks and driving product traceability across the value chain.

Our vision, “More Protein for More People, Sustainably” reflects our aspiration to transform the seafood industry by delivering high-quality, traceable and reliable seafood to our customers. At its core, the group’s strengths lie in a network-driven stakeholder approach, advanced technology architecture, a capital-efficient and asset-light model, and an experienced team backed by prominent investors.

Name: Ocean Beauty Seafoods
Description: Ocean Beauty Seafoods began in 1910 as a small Seattle seafood shop known as the Washington Fish & Oyster Company. Over a century later, we have grown to become one of the largest and most successful seafood companies in North America, with seven distribution locations across the Western United States, and two smoking and processing plants in Washington state.

Name: UNIMA
Description:
Unima élève les premières gambas Label Rouge au monde. Et ce n’est pas un hasard. Les hommes et les femmes d’Unima sont des adeptes de la méthode douce. Dans les eaux pures de la mangrove de Madagascar, qui constituent le cadre d’un écosystème parfait, ils ont recréé des conditions idéales. Les crevettes sont élevées dans d’immenses bassins aux fonds naturels de terre, dans lesquels la très faible densité par mètre carré, le contrôle systématique de l’ensemble du cycle d’évolution et une surgélation ultra-rapide sont les garanties de la plus haute qualité. A travers ce label, c’est toute l’exigence des pêcheurs et des éleveurs du Groupe qui est reconnue. L’exigence de la qualité irréprochable. L’exigence de la fraîcheur absolue. L’exigence de la saveur la plus raffinée.
En un mot, l’exigence de l’excellence.

Name: Choice Canning Co.
Description:
Choice Canning Co. is the flagship venture of The Choice Group. Established in 1952 by the late Mr. O. C Thomas, Choice Canning Co. has emerged as an industry leader on a global stage.

We are the first company in India to establish a vertically integrated supply chain and state-of-the-art processing plant for ready-to-eat shrimp in retail bags. Our retail brand - Tastee Choice Food Products, was rated No.1 in the un-breaded shrimp category by A.C Neilsen.

Choice Canning Co. was also the first to introduce a fully air-conditioned and automated IQF system in India and the first seafood unit to get the prestigious ISO 9002 certification. 

Our processing plants are amfori BSCI, BAP and BRC certified. These certifications prove our commitment to International Standards of Quality. From ‘Farm to Fork’, we control the process so you get nothing short of perfection in every package.

Name: East Fish Processing LLC
Description:
At East Fish Processing LLC, we follow a futuristic approach in procuring sea species that are sustainable in its every aspect. We possess an international reputation of being the top exporters of freshest and healthy marine food who have a strong focus on the endangered environment of these species. As the first step to ensure the safety of seafood, we source it from proven and trustworthy sources. Precautions are taken to block the contamination of items processing at high-risk processing areas that conform to the standard quality and safety guidelines prescribed by international bodies. East Fish Processing LLC boasts of having fully equipped in-house laboratories to perform organoleptic bacteriological and chemical analyses that clearly avoid product contamination at every stage of seafood processing. Feeding millions of fish lovers around the globe, we are reaching out to new market places that not only span the UAE and the larger GCC region but also the entire Middle East, Far East Countries, USA, and Europe.

 

The plants confirm to high standards of quality that are ensured and monitored through the highly effective FSSC, ISO 22000 2005, HACCP, EU and USFDA Quality System. The company having a freezing capacity of 50 MT daily including Blast, and IQF Spiral freezers – and 10,000 MT of storage facility.

The companies rely on a fleet of refrigerated & chiller vehicles to deliver fresh, chilled and frozen and processed seafood products right to the doorsteps.

Name: Haven Foods LLC

Haven Foods is Your Seafood Sanctuary.

Name: Fishglobe Technologies
Description:
FishGLOBE - en lukket oppdrettsteknologi som er utviklet for å gjøre laksenæringen enda bedre, - mer lønnsom, mer bærekraftig og med høyere fiskevelferd. 

FishGLOBEene er kuleformede med flytekragen inni, og med plass til fôr og alt utsyr som trengs innunder taket. FishGLOBE bygges i PE (polyetylen) – og ved å bruke den patenterte løsningen og kanalplater av dette materialet i veggen, så oppnås også nødvendig stivhet til å bygge store flytende oppdrettstanker. 

FishGLOBE til lukket oppdrett av laks - postsmoltproduksjon
Konstruksjonen er utformet for å enkelt og rimelig kunne transportere store mengder vann. Da reduseres behovet for oksygentilsetning, og en får lavere driftskostnader. Det er et stort avløpsrør i sentrum og mange tilførselsrør. Tilførselsrørene plasseres med riktig avstand fra ytterveggen, for å få optimalt strømningsbilde inne i kulen. Disse rørene er samtidig dragerne som stiver av veggene. 

FishGLOBE til behandling mot lakselus og AGD
FishGLOBE er tett i toppen, og kan derfor ved å skape et overtrykk inne i globen, skånsomt flytte fisk ut. Fisken vil renne uhindret gjennom rør og slanger ut av FishGLOBE. FishGLOBE løsningen er også perfekt til behandling med bademidler som hydrogenperoksyd ol, da en har et kontrollert volum og kontroll på vannsirkulasjonen. FishGLOBE kan også benyttes til ferskvannsbehandling. En fyller globen med ferskvann, for så å pumpe inn fisk med avsiling av sjøvann. Det er vannsirkulasjon med oksygenering i tillegg til CO2 fjerning, kan fisken gå i ferskvann over lengre tid.

FishGLOBE til matfiskoppdrett
Anlegget for matfisk har dobbelt så stort diameter (44 m), og er på hele 29 000 m3. Det har kapasitet til å holde 3 MTB på det meste – dermed kan en tredoble produksjonen på en matfisklokalitet! Investeringskostnaden vil nok bli nesten like lav som tradisjonelle åpne merder, siden materialet er så rimelig og at her slipper en fôrflåte da hver enhet har «alt». FishGLOBEene kan til og med flyttes med fisk inni.

Name: Proximar Seafood AS
Description:
Proximar Seafood is a Norwegian land-based salmon farming company with its first production facility and production at the foot of Mount Fuji in Japan.

The company inserted its first batch of eggs in October 2022 and plans first harvest in Q3 2024. Through land-based salmon farming, using high-quality ground water secured close to Mount Fuji, the company will produce fresh Atlantic Salmon, harvested the same day. 

Proximar's location, near one of the world's most important fish markets, implies significant advantages, both in terms of reduced cost and carbon footprint.

Name: Sağdıçlar Grup
Description:
1981 yılında 5 kardeş tarafından kurulan grup şirketi, yetki ve sorumlulukların profesyonel ekipler ile paylaşıldığı kurumsal bir aile şirketidir. Türk Patent Kurumu'na kayıtlı 22 patenti bulunan Sağdıçlar Grup, 4 sektörde 7 farklı marka ile faaliyet göstermektedir.
Grup şirketleri içinde ilk ve en büyüğü olan Sağdıçlar Balıkçılık, Türkiye'de balık ve deniz ürünleri sektörünün lider firmalarından biridir. 38 yıllık tecrübesi ile ana faaliyeti balık ve işlenmiş deniz ürünlerinin toptan ve perakende ticaretidir. 2019 yılında Karadeniz Artvin'de yıllık 4000 ton kapasiteli Türk Somonu yetiştiriciliği faaliyetine başlamıştır.
2005 yılında kurulan İdeal Hipermarketleri, yaklaşık 2500 m2 satış alanı, toplam 100 çalışanı ile 2 farklı lokasyonda faaliyet göstermektedir. ideal.com.tr ile online market hizmeti sunan İdeal Hipermarketleri, bunun yanı sıra yerel marketlere toptan ürün satışı gerçekleştirmektedir.
Balık Ye, işlenmiş ürün, taze ürün ve franchise restoran markası olarak grup çatısı altında yer almaktadır. Aynı zamanda online balık marketi olarak balikye.com üzerinden müşterileri ile buluşmaktadır. Balık Ye Restoran İstanbul'da 2 lokasyonda, Balık Ye Satış Reyonları ise, 4 lokasyonda faaliyet göstermektedir.
Bando Seafood markası ile, kültür balıkları, yabani balıklar ve işlenmiş deniz ürünlerinin üretimi, toptan ve perakende ticareti yapılmaktadır. Bando Seafood markalı ürünler birçok ülkede market zincirlerinin raflarında yerini almıştır.
Save As Yazılım grup şirketlerinin teknolojik yazılım ve donanım ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak amacıyla 2011 yılında kuruldu. Grup firmalarında % 70 oranında Save As yazılımları kullanılmaktadır. Müşteri portföyüne grup şirketleri haricinde birçok kurumsal markayı katarak büyümesini sürdürmektedir.

Name: Sea Star Foodstuff Exports
Description:
Sea Star Foodstuff Trading was established in 2018 from Sultanate of Oman, to supply high quality seafood to HORECA channels worldwide. We expanded operations across the Oman and corporate office in Muscat. Ever since we have proved to be an extremely successful model in the seafood industry.
We strive to supply the best quality products, even for the in-demand species of seafood. Be it portions, Fillets, Frozen, we can source raw material, process, and distribute any product type to your required specifications.
We are excited to introduce our company to you we take pride in delivering top-quality marine fishes to markets around the world. Our extensive product range encompasses a diverse selection of marine fishes.
What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to quality and safety. our quality control ensures that our processing facilities meet the highest standards for hygiene and product quality. We take pride in the transparency and traceability of our supply chain, which guarantees that our seafood is sustainably sourced.
By choosing us as your trusted marine fish supplier, you'll benefit from:
1. Premium Quality: We provide only the freshest and finest seafood products to meet your customers' expectations, even as well as for bait.
2. Variety: Our diverse range of marine fishes allows you to cater to the preferences of your market.
3. Reliability: We ensure timely deliveries and consistent supply to meet your demands.
4. Sustainability: We are committed to responsible and sustainable fishing practices.
Our commitment to excellence is evident in the variety of marine species we offer, each with its unique taste and culinary potential. Whether you're in search of the distinctive flavor you can count on us to meet your needs.

Name: FiiZK
Description:
FiiZK er markedets ledende leverandør av komplette storskala lukkede anlegg på sjø for produksjon av postsmolt.


Siden 2014 har vi levert over 24 lukkede anlegg – desidert flest i verden – til oppdrettskunder i Norge og internasjonalt. Som pioner har vi hatt en lang reise med både oppturer og nedturer – fra første prototype til dagens flaggskip Protectus. Dagens FiiZK-team har opparbeidet seg en unik kunnskap og erfaring rundt lukkede anlegg på sjø. Med etablerte kundeforhold, gode samarbeidspartnere, engasjerte medarbeidere, og solide eiere i ryggen, jobber vi hver dag for å kunne tilby de beste løsningene til markedet.

Name: BMR GROUP
Description:
BMR INDUSTRIES
Dr. BEEDA MASTHAN RAO
Founding Chairman and Managing Director, BMR Group

Father of Vannamei in India
Dr. B. Masthan Rao, the founding chairman of BMR GROUP of industries is a man of humble beginnings. Fondly known as BMR, Mr. Rao began his seafood journey in 1991 in his hometown, Iskapalli with “Seed
Culture”. Today, almost 30 years later, the group has expanded into a conglomerate of Multiple Seed Hatcheries, Shrimp processing facilities, Feed manufacturing facilities and Exports to major international cities.
BMR Group established India’s First Broodstock Multiplication Center in the year 2019. BMR group is known to be one of the most respected and sought-after groups in the seafood industry.

Mr. Rao is popularly known as the “Father of Vannamei Farming in India” for pioneering the use of Penaeus Vannamei in 2004. From being the first individual who introduced India to a new species called “L.Vannamei”
to establishing India's first ever Broodstock Multiplication Center, Mr. Rao’s contributions to the Indian Seafood industry have changed the face of the industry. His contributions introduced the rural aquaculture
farmers to international markets opening more revenus for the industry that led to a meteoric rise in India’s shrimp production.
BMR attributes its success to their ability to update themselves with the ever-growing trends in the industry, its prestigious clientele and their ever-committed workforce. BMR Group’s business plan and success mantra has remained the same – “QUALITY”.

Description:

Name: Bellucci Srl Prodotti Ittici
Description:
La pescheria nasce nel 1962, dal sogno e dalla passione di Franco Bellucci, che dal 1976 l'ha fatta diventare un vero e proprio brand. Dopo aver visitato i principali porti e mercati dell'Adriatico, Franco decide di provare a portare il mercato del pesce a Modena, una terra da sempre considerata patria di 'Lambrusco e tortellini'. Una sfida non semplice, che la nostra famiglia ha vinto con successo e che ci ha fatto fare il salto di qualità: in poco tempo siamo riusciti a sviluppare una distribuzione organizzata di prodotti ittici in tutte le principali province emiliane come Bologna, Parma, Reggio Emilia e tutto l’interland di paesi limitrofi. 

Non ci siamo mai fermati, e grazie alla costante evoluzione in termini di ricerca prodotti e nuove tendenze, oggi lavoriamo con i più importanti mercati nazionali, europei ed internazionali rispondendo alle esigenze di tutti i consumatori, dalla ristorazione alle pescherie locali.

Da qualche anno il timone è passato in mano alla terza generazione: Marco Bellucci dirige l’azienda con un approccio giovane ed innovativo che non perde mai di vista la tradizione di famiglia.

5.5 kVA – 110 kVA aralığında marin jeneratörler
40 hp – 130 hp aralığında marin ana makineler
üretmektedir.

Name: Blueshark srl
Description:
Bulesharksrl è un'azienda italiana specializzata nella lavorazione di pesce di altissima qualità, con particolare attenzione alla produzione di pesce marinato. La nostra passione e dedizione per il pesce si traducono in un prodotto finito di altissimo livello, in grado di soddisfare le esigenze dei palati più esigenti.

Ci impegniamo costantemente a garantire la massima qualità dei nostri prodotti, utilizzando tecniche di lavorazione tradizionali e artigianali, che consentono di preservare la freschezza e il gusto del pesce. Tutti i nostri prodotti sono lavorati a mano, con molta cura e amore, in modo da garantire la massima attenzione ai dettagli e alla qualità.

Il nostro assortimento di prodotti comprende alcune delle specie ittiche più pregiate, tra cui salmone, pesce spada, alici e baccalà. Tutti i nostri prodotti sono selezionati con estrema cura, utilizzando solo pesci di alta qualità, provenienti da fonti sostenibili e responsabili dal punto di vista ambientale.

Il nostro impegno per la sostenibilità e la tutela delle specie marine è una delle nostre priorità assolute. Ci impegniamo a lavorare in modo responsabile e sostenibile, rispettando le specie ittiche e gli ecosistemi marini, per garantire un futuro per il nostro pianeta.

La collaborazione con alcuni dei più grandi distributori della grande distribuzione italiana, tra cui Coop, Conad, Adriatico CE.DI.Marche e Coal, ci consente di garantire una capillare distribuzione dei nostri prodotti in tutta Italia, offrendo ai nostri clienti una vasta scelta di pesce di altissima qualità.

In sintesi, Bulesharksrl rappresenta una scelta ideale per tutti coloro che desiderano acquistare pesce di altissima qualità, lavorato a mano con passione e dedizione, con un forte impegno nella tutela delle specie ittiche e degli ecosistemi marini.

Comme pour le vin ou le café, une crevette d’exception est l’expression d’un milieu autant que d’un savoir-faire.
Sona Qwehli est née de cette exigence.

Issue du golfe de Kutch, sur la côte ouest de l’Inde, elle s’inscrit dans une lecture précise des équilibres marins, des rythmes naturels et des gestes qui accompagnent la matière jusqu’à sa pleine expression.

Sona Qwehli s’adresse aux professionnels qui considèrent la crevette comme une pièce de travail, où la régularité, la tenue et la fidélité à l’origine structurent le geste et la décision.

Elle prolonge une vision du métier fondée sur la précision, la constance et le respect du temps nécessaire à la qualité.

Servir Sona Qwehli, c’est faire le choix d’une crevette pensée pour les grandes tables et les professionnels qui font de la mer un langage de précision et de transmission.

Michael Black was a seasoned and forward-thinking longline fisherman who built a reputation by selecting the finest catch from each trip to provide high-quality, fresh seafood to premier dining establishments. In 1987, he started selling seafood directly from a box truck, quickly earning a loyal customer base with his commitment to quality. By 1993, he expanded into a full scale processing facility, supplying customers nationwide.
 
In 2021, Michael’s son, Jonathan Black, took the helm after his father’s passing from cancer. Driven to honor his father’s legacy, Jon launched a line of seafood products in 2024 under the Captain Black’s name, ensuring that Michael’s passion for quality and dedication to his craft continue to inspire.

At Captain Black’s, our commitment to excellence is unwavering. We take pride in offering 100% natural seafood, free from chemicals, gases, and artificial powders used to retain color. Every product in our line is gluten-free, and wild-caught (with the exception of salmon). We never use fillers, ensuring that you get only the highest-quality seafood in every bite. Additionally, select products can be Kosher certified, meeting the highest standards of purity and preparation. 

At Captain Black’s, we stand behind our products—because when it comes to seafood, only the best will do.

WHY DO WE DO IT?
Easyfish AS mission is to combat the world's obesity problem by "snackifying" Norwegian seafood. Name: EARL Huîtres Lemoigne
Description:
Située sur la Côte Nord Bretagne à Ploubazlanec dans les Côtes d’Armor, l’entreprise créée par François Lemoigne a démarré en 2008.

Nous produisons actuellement 80 tonnes par an sur 4 hectares de parc. L’entreprise compte actuellement 3 salariés à temps plein.

Les huitres sont issues de naissain naturel. Celui-ci est capté sur des parcs en Charentes maritime à Fourras sur des coupelles.
Le naissain, une fois arrivé à maturité (après 4 à 8 mois de pousse) est alors placé dans des poches qui sont ensuite disposées sur des tables en mer sur nos parcs à Ploubazlanec afin que les huîtres poursuivent leur croissance pendant environ 3 années.
Les parcs sont situés dans la baie de Paimpol entre l’archipel de Bréhat
et l’ile Saint Riom.
La qualité de l’eau et la force du courant en Baie de Paimpol permettent d’obtenir des huîtres charnues et iodées à la saveur unique.
Directement du producteur au consommateur, la fraîcheur de
nos produits est garantie.
Nous mettons un point d’honneur à rester proches des consommateurs et offrir un produit d’exception avec un gage de qualité.

Description:

Herring can also take credit for being one of the major reasons for developing Swedish prosperity during the 18th and 19th centuries. With its fantastic health benefits and abundant presence, the herring contributed to turning poverty into prosperity.

Today, herring is a vital and appreciated component of traditional meals but also serves as a delicious and healthy everyday food at a lower cost. Sweden Pelagic has been a quality- and sustainability-conscious herring supplier to the Swedish and European canning industry since the mid-20th century.

Name: Ocean Fresh Pvt Ltd
Description:
Ocean Fresh Pvt Ltd is a premium seafood export company based in the Maldives, dedicated to supplying fresh, chilled Yellowfin Tuna to the global market. Since our founding in 2001, we have built a strong reputation for consistency, product quality, and ethical sourcing rooted in sustainable practices.

We specialize in high-quality tuna products including: • Saku Block (center cut for sashimi/sushi)
• Yellowfin Tuna Loins, Chunks & Steaks
• Tuna Belly, Trims, and Tail
• Whole Tuna (H&G and G&G)

All our products are wild-caught in the Indian Ocean and processed in our EU Standard Certified, BRC, HACCP, and FDA-registered facility. We ensure hygienic handling, vacuum sealing, and cold chain integrity from source to shipment. Ocean Fresh operates strictly in the fresh segment — we do not offer frozen tuna. Our team guarantees export-ready packing with gel ice and temperature-controlled logistics via airfreight.

We proudly support local Maldivian fishermen and invest in long-term sustainability of our fisheries. Our commitment extends to building lasting relationships with importers, distributors, hotels, restaurant groups, and foodservice chains worldwide.

Ocean Fresh currently exports to the UAE, Europe, Asia, and the United States, offering consistent weekly supply and responsive customer support.

Description:
Blue Reef is the premier supplier of wild Australian Coral Trout, caught by hand on the Great Barrier. Australian-owned and operated, we’ve been providing the highest quality live and chilled Australian Coral Trout to restaurants and retailers around the world for over 20 years. 

From Gladstone to Cooktown, we work with a fleet of over 35 fishing vessels to supply our partners with the freshest Australian Coral Trout.  Each fish is caught by hand, using handline fishing techniques which means no by-catch, no net fishing, and no other harmful fishing practices. Harvesting within quotas set and managed by the Australian Fisheries Management Authority, our sustainable fishing practices keep Australian Coral Trout, and the incredible marine ecosystem as a whole, in good health into the future.

Name: Centre for Seafood Innovation
Description:
The Vancouver Island University Centre for Seafood Innovation (CSI) initiative ended on March 31, 2024. 

Since April 2021, CSI has played an important role in supporting innovation among seafood entrepreneurs while providing valuable experiential learning opportunities to post-secondary students. Its successful initiatives will be continued by industry, First Nations, and Vancouver Island University (VIU). 

CSI was launched in 2021 with three years of funding through the BC Ministry of Agriculture and Food. This funding has successfully created a legacy of valuable programs and relationships that will endure. In 3 years, with 2 staff, CSI completed 24 projects, organized 19 events, provided experiential learning opportunities to more than 300 students, and engaged more than a thousand community members.

Name: Fishlog International, Inc.
Description:
FishLog International is a technology-driven company dedicated to addressing the critical issues of food waste and lack of transparency within the seafood supply chain. Our overarching mission is to foster sustainability through enhanced responsibility, leading to a more accountable and responsible tomorrow. At the core of our operations, FishLog International has established a cooperative comprising like-minded entrepreneurs engaged in seafood processing globally. This cooperative is united by a shared commitment to traceability and responsibility

Our approach involves leveraging a powerful network of collaborators to effect positive change in the lives of our employees and strategic partners. By uniting under the banner of traceability and responsibility, we seek to disrupt the industry and redefine accountability. Simultaneously, we aim to provide avenues for growth, instigate positive community transformations, and inspire the youth, all while ensuring the production of high-quality seafood items at competitive prices.

The Backbone of our strategy lies in the seamless integration of technology, marketing, and a truly dynamic supply chain cooperative. Through this strategic alignment, we strive to achieve scale and efficiency, positioning ourselves as industry leaders in promoting sustainability. Our producers are not just suppliers but vested partners, all actively engaged in creating a better, more traceable future. At FishLog International, we are committed to building this future together, where every stakeholder has a tangible stake in the game and contributes to the shared goal of a  more sustainable and responsible seafood industry.

Name: Entreprise Kermarée
Description:
La société Kermarée est née en 1991 de la volonté commune de deux conchyliculteurs du bassin d’élevage de l’Ouest Cotentin, William Madelaine et Jean-Pierre K’dual, de diffuser leurs productions familiales auprès des principales enseignes de la grande distribution. 

Ce partenariat favorise le développement de leurs activités de production, ce qui les pousse à construire en 1995 un site industriel qui est aujourd’hui le siège social de l’entreprise.

Pour répondre aux attentes de leurs clients et servir un marché dynamique, et en pleine mutation, ils décident en 2002 de créer une extension technique des ateliers existants répondant aux normes européennes et permettant d'étendre la gamme avec les produits cuits.

Cet outil est aujourd’hui le reflet du savoir-faire de Kermarée et de sa capacité à recentrer les produits issus de la pêche ou de l’élevage local et de transformer les coquillages et crustacés de toutes provenances en Europe.

Kermarée représente à ce jour un réseau performant, contrôlé en interne par le service qualité, de partenaires :
des producteurs conchylicoles pour les activités d’élevage d’huîtres et de moules de bouchot
des pêcheurs de bulots, praires, palourdes et moules de Barfleur.
 

Une équipe dynamique, à l’écoute de vos besoins :

Kermarée dispose d'une équipe commerciale et technique professionnelle, compétente, connaissant parfaitement les produits et dont la mission quotidienne est de vous transmettre le meilleur de la mer.

Depuis 1991, la philosophie de Kermarée est de se concentrer particulièrement sur la qualité et la diversité des produits de la mer.

Name: South Seafoods
Description:
Processor of natural and marinated (non CO treated YF tuna), mahi mahi, vannamei shrimp and pota squid.
For more than 34 years we have grown our business of the production and marketing   seafood products. Having covered most of the stages that comprise this business, investing our own capital to equip fishing vessels to let us produce by ourselves, on the purchase of raw material from our suppliers, and on our processing plants. 
The fisheries resources have changed due to different reasons (world climate among them), and the seafood business has changed accordingly. 
Not to be unrelated to these changes, we have changed our business to adapt it to the new conditions and we continue evolving, trying to foresee the changes that future will bring. 
Today we focus more to produce directly in different countries, with our suppliers in a balanced relationship based on sharing risks and profits on production and processing of our seafood products, ensuring our customers the purchases that they make to our company. 
Also focus more ourselves to develop the marketing of new species that are already present in our workplaces, enabling them meet the demands of new customers in new markets and giving as well also the opportunity to our customers to add new species to their existing products 
In this way our supply sources are growing in number and variety, as new suppliers come to be part of our structure, meantime sales increase proportionally.
More companies in the world have found on our company the solution for their purchase of seafood products, being vertically integrated to the raw material sources, and knowing that our presence is focused on each stage of production and marketing, making successful the business operations.

Name: Jamestown Seafood
Description:
Jamestown Seafood’s aquaculture practices celebrate the heritage of native S’Klallam traditions. 

Spawning and early growth takes place at the Tribe’s Point Whitney Hatchery in Brinnon, Washington, and in Kona, Hawaii, where oyster seed is nurtured, lovingly fed algae grown on site, and bathed in constantly flowing cold, clean sea water.

Later, under the veil where the blurred line between land and sea meets, on the pristine beaches of Sequim and Quilcene in Washington state, the shellfish continue to grow and thrive in their natural environment. When they are appropriately sized for the various markets the Tribe serves, the shellfish are harvested and shipped live.

Without compromise, Jamestown Seafood’s focus is on seafood grown by people who have shellfish in their blood, through generation upon generation of cultural heritage and family cuisine. Every morsel has been grown and gathered with the utmost respect for our home, the Earth, and for our ancestors, our legacy. We invite you to share in enjoying the treasured bounty from our pristine saltwater beds to nourish your body and nurture your soul.

Name: Maldon Oysters
Description:
Using the latest techniques science can offer, we produce some of the UK’s finest oysters. Like farmers and fishermen combined, we obsess over the timeless oystermans’ art of nurturing, hand-picking and hand-grading our oysters. However, this natural and sustainable approach is married with an unrivalled, state-of-the-art oyster depuration process. 

Maldon Oysters are carefully nurtured over a period of years until they are ready for our customers. Our ethos ensures that our oysters are of the best quality available. It is an ethos of impeccable quality control. We have the stock and scale to ensure that there is never a need to rush.

The majority of the oysters we grow on our beds in Essex are Rock Oysters (Gigas). This oyster is known for its deep cupped shell and smooth and meaty texture. They are often described as having a rich but not overbearing flavour with a sweet aftertaste.

Each oyster will pass through the hands of our team over half a dozen times before it is deemed ready to harvest. We hand turn, split and soft-grade the oysters, waiting patiently for each oyster to reach the perfect shape and size. 

While we embrace everything that technology has to offer in our innovative depuration process, when it comes to growing and cultivating our oysters, traditional methods and a hands-on approach have served us well.

Name: Hiravati Group
Description: At Hiravati Group, we take immense pride in our journey as pioneers in the Indian seafood export industry. Our story began in 1975, and since then, we’ve continuously explored new horizons within the seafood processing industry. Over the years, we’ve built a seamless infrastructure for processing various seafood products, including Surimi, Frozen and Pasteurized Seafood, Marine Collagen, Surimi Analog Products, and Fish Meal. Our strength lies in our well-developed infrastructure, advanced technology, and a strong network of fishermen, which collectively set us apart in the industry. Today, Hiravati Group stands as a beacon of quality and innovation, offering a diverse range of high-quality seafood products, including Cuttlefish, Squid, Octopus, Crab Meat, Marine Collagen, Surimi, Fish Meal, Imitation Crab Stick, and more. We draw inspiration from our core principles—Trust, Innovation, and Tradition—to create fresh trends in seafood consumption. This trinity forms the foundation of our commitment to delivering responsibly sourced and processed superior seafood directly to you. Our dedication to excellence has earned us recognition, including industry awards and certifications for quality and sustainability. We proudly serve customers in various regions with a global reach, ensuring our seafood delights tables worldwide. At Hiravati Group, our mission is simple: to provide you with the finest seafood products, backed by our unwavering commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation. Join us on our journey and discover the taste of excellence.

Name: Ittica Fichera
Description:
Ittica Fichera è esperienza, etica e passione. 
L'idea di Giuseppe Fichera, CEO e fondatore dell'azienda, è quella di portare avanti una tradizione che racconta l’autenticità del mare, il lavoro dei pescatori e la capacità di mettere al centro di tutto il benessere delle persone. 

Sia nel business che nel consumo, l'azienda offre prodotti di alta qualità, dalla varietà e profondità di assortimento impareggiabili, mantenendo sempre elevati gli standard di efficienza e funzionalità.

L’obiettivo principale è la promozione del mangiar sano, vivendo in armonia col mare, tramite azioni ben congegnate che coinvolgono un processo di educazione e di trasmissione delle conoscenze. 

Il core-business dell’azienda è il pesce fresco, mediterraneo e locale, proveniente dalla piccola pesca catanese e siciliana. Non manca, però, anche un’ampia varietà di prodotti ittici nazionali, internazionali e frutti di mare per garantire la soddisfazione delle esigenze di tutti i consumatori. 

Ittica Fichera is experience, ethics, and passion. 
Giuseppe Fichera, CEO and company founder, wants to carry on a tradition that tells of the authenticity of the sea, the work of fishermen, and the ability to put people's well-being at the center of everything. 

At both commercial and consumer levels, the company offers a wide range of high-quality products, maintaining high standards of efficiency and functionality.

The main objective is the promotion of healthy eating, and living in harmony with the sea, through well-thought-out actions involving a process of education and knowledge transmission.

The company's core business is fresh, Mediterranean, and local fish from small-scale fishing in Catania and Sicily. However, there is also a wide variety of national and international fish and seafood products to ensure the satisfaction of all consumers' needs.

Name: Regal Bight Fisheries Pty Ltd

Proudly South Australian. Passionate About Premium, Sustainable Seafood. 

At Regal Bight Fisheries, we are dedicated to delivering the finest seafood, sourced sustainably from the pristine waters of South Australia. Our renowned retail destination, Parissos Seafoods at Port Adelaide, showcase the finest locally sourced seafood, cherished by our customers for its exceptional quality. 

Our commitment to quality and sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. By working closely with local Marine Scale Fisherman and Aquaculture producers, we ensure that every product meets the highest standards of freshness and ethical sourcing. We are proud to support our local communities and ecosystems, fostering practices that protect and preserve our oceans for future generations.

Whether you're purchasing wholesale, retail, or direct from our processing facilities, we guarantee quality, consistency, and a passion for the sea that sets us apart.

At Regal Bight, we believe in doing business with integrity, delivering the finest local seafood products, and being a key part of the thriving South Australian seafood industry.

Established in 1999 in Sri Lanka, Apollo Marine engages in the processing and export of fresh and frozen fish, prawns, and cuttlefish. Our facilities boast refrigerated areas for transportation, reception, processing, and dispatch, ensuring the preservation of our products' quality. We take pride in offering customized products tailored to the specific requirements of our clients, including cut, grade, packaging, and barcoding.

With a vast global customer base, our exports reach destinations such as the UK, Europe, Japan, USA, and China. To meet the demands of our international clientele, we maintain a daily processing and export routine, with our factory operational 21 hours a day, 7 days a week, 52 weeks a year.

At Apollo Marine, we prioritize quality and safety, employing a fully-electronic bespoke traceability system that tracks our products from the vessel to the end customer. Additionally, our on-site laboratory conducts thorough histamine, mercury, and microbiological testing, ensuring the highest standards are met. We are proud holders of the BRC Food Safety Accreditation Grade AA, a testament to our commitment to excellence in food safety practices.

Description:

From specially selected Scottish Salmon, the fillets are cured and prepared for smoking. The salmon fillets are then placed into our kilns, smoked over oak and beech fires for many hours until declared ready by our Head smoker.

The final result is traditional Scottish Smoked Salmon, complimented with the aroma and taste produced by the oak fires, truly capturing the taste of Scotland

The near-shore operation in Västra Götaland is aimed at growing Sugar Kelp (Saccharina latissima) in stable quantities and to a standardized quality, to supply to off takers in the value chain. Both local and international. 

We see the potential for seaweed to support in the major transitions our society is facing, amongst others the food and energy transitions. The uses for seaweed are:

1. Human Consumption / Culinary Uses
2. Nutritional Supplement
3. Animal Feed /Soil improvement
4. Biodegradable Products and plastics
5. Biofuel Production
6. Environmental Benefits, blue carbon and biodiversity improvement 
7. Coastal protection and marine habitat creation.
8. Cosmetics and pharmaceuticals 
9. Medical Research

Name: Cantek Harvester Innovations
Description:
Modular Solutions. Mobile Innovation. Maximum Impact.

Cantek Harvester Innovations brings revolutionary containerized processing technology directly to Canada's harvesters and producers—eliminating the infrastructure barriers that have locked communities out of food processing for generations.

Our Mission:
We exist to democratize food processing access across remote, rural, coastal, northern, and Indigenous communities, enabling small-scale producers to capture the full value of their harvest without shipping thousands of kilometers to centralized facilities.

What We Do:
We design, manufacture, and deploy fully equipped modular processing units housed in shipping containers—bringing complete fish, food, and livestock processing capabilities anywhere harvest happens. From ocean to table in one location. From field to finished product without leaving your community.

Who We Serve:

Indigenous communities reclaiming food sovereignty

Coastal fisheries and aquaculture operations

Small-scale livestock and poultry producers

Remote agricultural communities lacking processing infrastructure

Food cooperatives and regional aggregators

Why It Matters:
Canada exports raw resources and imports processed food—often from our own harvest. Processing infrastructure has consolidated into urban centers, leaving 70% of small producers without viable local options. We're reversing that equation, one mobile unit at a time.

Our Approach:

Modular & scalable – Start with one container, expand as needed

Fully mobile – Process where you harvest, when you're ready

Turn-key operations – Complete systems with training and support

Community-centered – Built for equity, not just efficiency

The Impact:
When processing comes to the community instead of the other way around, small producers reduce costs by 30-40%, eliminate quality loss from transport delays, create local jobs, and keep value where it belongs—in the hands of the people who feed us.

Name: ECO-VAM

Cet événement sera une opportunité d'échanges sur les récentes avancées scientifiques et les orientations stratégiques nationales et internationales des deux pays pour un secteur marin durable. Ce symposium scientifique collaboratif est aussi le lieu de rencontre entre les étudiants, les scientifiques, les industriels et les différents acteurs du monde socio-économique du secteur marin pour une mobilisation collective afin de promouvoir l'Economie Circulaire et de proposer des solutions visant une meilleure gestion des coproduits marins contribuant ainsi à la lutte contre les Changements Climatiques.

Name: Nordic Shrimp ApS
Description:
Nordic Shrimp ApS producerer bæredygtige, varmevandsrejer på land i Danmark – baseret på moderne RAS-teknologi, høj vandgenbrug og fokus på ansvarlig produktion.

Vi arbejder med recirkulerende akvakultursystemer, der gør det muligt at genbruge 90–97% af vandet og sikre stabile forhold for dyrene året rundt. Vores mål er at producere friske, lokale rejer af høj kvalitet, uden antibiotika og med fuld sporbarhed.

Hvorfor gøre det?
Fordi næsten alle varmtvandsrejer, der spises i Danmark i dag, bliver importeret langvejsfra. Det vil vi ændre ved at bringe produktionen tættere på forbrugeren og skabe et mere bæredygtigt alternativ.

På denne side deler vi rejsen:
– Opbygning af vores første RAS-anlæg
– Teknologiske valg og løsninger
– Produktionen og driftsprocesser
– Udfordringer, læring og udvikling

Name: GUIDRYS CATFISH LLC
Description:
Our Story:
From Bayou Beginnings to Industry Innovators
It all started with Bobby & Debbie Guidry’s vision, a couple with deep roots in the community, who saw the potential in the humble catfish. With hands and hearts devoted to the craft, they began their journey—trapping, and eventually processing the day’s catch in a small, bustling 20’x20’ building.

Their dedication to research and development in those early years laid the foundation and ultimately led to the discovery of another source of catfish that was not wild-caught. In 1976, our founders saw an opportunity in the farm-raised catfish industry, this discovery set the stage for the thriving business we have today.


Our Growth:
Embracing Change While Honoring Tradition
Our passion has guided us from a small, family-run operation to an expansive enterprise, employing over 400 dedicated individuals and operating out of a 100,000 square foot state-of-the-art facility.

Despite the undeniable changes, some things at Guidry’s will always remain the same; Our dedication to excellence is unwavering—every catfish product we produce is a promise of quality. We continue to offer consistent, premium U.S. Farm-Raised catfish products at fair prices. Our relationship with our customers goes beyond business; it’s a trusted partnership built over decades.

Name: DistanSea
Description:
Holding and transporting live seafood presents significant challenges due to the rapid build-up of toxic ammonia and other harmful byproducts in closed-system tanks. This harsh environment stresses the animals, leading to mortality, reduced quality, and increased waste.
DistanSea offers innovative water treatment solutions designed to overcome these challenges and create a stable, non-toxic environment for live seafood throughout the supply chain. Our patented technology effectively removes harmful ammonia and controls other critical water parameters, enabling customers to efficiently and cost-effectively transport and hold live seafood across various distances and durations.
Key Benefits of DistanSea's Solutions:
•	Increased Profitability: Higher survival rates, reduced operational costs, and the ability to reach new markets translate to significant improvements in profitability.
•	Significant Cost Reduction: Achieve up to 70% reduction in transport costs by enabling higher stocking densities and longer transport times, potentially replacing expensive air freight with sea freight.
•	Reduced Carbon Footprint: Contribute to environmental sustainability with up to 90% reduction in carbon emissions by shifting to more energy-efficient transport methods and minimizing mortality.
•	Enhanced Food Quality: Maintain the freshness, vitality, and taste of live seafood, ensuring premium quality upon arrival and extending the time available for sale.
Our initial product, an easy-to-integrate add-on to existing live seafood transport and holding systems (Local ART), has undergone successful pilots in a large brown crabs holding facility. And on King Crabs in crustacean seafood company in Norway.
DistanSea is committed to transforming the live seafood industry by providing reliable, cost-effective, and sustainable water treatment solutions that benefit businesses, consumers, and the environment.

Name: Pescheria Ferroni | Milano

Pescheria Ferroni a Milano dal 1910 vi porta ogni giorno
le bontà del mare in città

La migliore pescheria a Milano che vi offre pesce nostrano, estero e molto altro direttamente a casa Vostra un giorno per l'altro.

Da pescheria Ferroni a Milano – il mare in città – direttamente dal mercato ittico di Milano ogni mattina il miglior pesce presente a Milano.

Ampia varietà di PESCE NOSTRANO o estero preparato a seconda delle tue esigenze all’insegna della massima freschezza e sempre nel rispetto dei periodi di fermo pesca e dalla filiera certa.

Nello shop e nei nostri mercati rionali potrai trovare questo e molto altro ancora perché pescheria Ferroni è il mare in città a Milano

Da 70 anni portiamo i frutti del mare in tavola e
oggi la storia si rinnova con Tiziano
 
Da generazioni al sorgere del sole, la nostra famiglia orgogliosa del suo lavoro, acquista e sceglie nel principale mercato ittico di Milano, il miglior pesce fresco nostrano e di importazione.

Pescheria Ferroni nasce nel 1944 prima della guerra grazie all’impegno del Sig. Gaetano Ferroni.
Rilevata interamente dai figli Antonio e Roberto che con il loro nuovo impulso hanno portato Pescheria Ferroni ad essere punto di riferimento nel mercato ittico a Milano. 

La lunga tradizione iniziata dai nonni, nei mercati rionali nei quali si assaporava una atmosfera di genuina semplicità
continua con Tiziano figlio di Antonio, che ha fatto del suo lavoro la sua passione e ad oggi prosegue l'attività giunta alla quarta generazione.

Servizio impeccabile e innovazione sono le parole chiave che ogni giorno ripetiamo a noi stessi, quando il rumore metallico della serranda che si apre dà il via alla nostra giornata, perché ciò che facciamo e che ci ispira non è fatto solamente di vendita e presenza in pescheria ma anche di ricerca, dedizione e aggiornamento.

Adriaticlams si rivolge al mercato dei grossisti e delle pescherie che servono la ristorazione in tutta Italia, Europa e oltre, avvalendosi della collaborazione di fornitori selezionati e della collaborazione di rinomati chef e ristoranti; affinché possano testimoniare l’eccellenza delle materie prime del Mar Adriatico.

Adriaticlams sostiene la pesca di allevamento con la ricerca continua delle migliori fonti di approvvigionamento, tecniche di pesca innovative che abbiano il minor impatto sull’ecosistema con particolare attenzione anche al confezionamento del prodotto che possa così garantire standard ottimali di sicurezza alimentare e che allo stesso tempo un imballaggio ecologico a difesa dell’ambiente.

Name: The Orkney Food Company Ltd
Description:
Well-known by many and immortalised by fishermen from the North of Scotland as Silver Darlings, Herring have been harvested from the North Atlantic for many decades, which has inspired James to continue to produce a range of popular herring cures with pride and heritage. 

James’ Grandfather Jim, had successfully cured herring in wooden barrels in the early 70’s, exporting to Scandinavia but sadly for Jim, in the late 70s the herring production ceased due to the ban on herring fishing in Scotland at that time. 
Thankfully, the situation has now changed and herring are being caught again; from the same waters which formed the lifeblood of Jim’s business many years ago; but are now sustainably managed for the future.

Working to this day with traditional process, the recipe, now perfected by the fourth generations of the Paterson family will remain a closely guarded secret to pass down to the next generation.

Building on the strengths of the family business, recent times have seen a further progression for the Paterson clan with the acquisition of the well-respected ‘Orkney Food Company’ brand. Previously known as ‘The Orkney Herring Company’, the business had sadly been placed into administration in 2012, however was revived in 2017 when James and his father, Lewis saw an opportunity and made the noble move to purchase the brand and add it to their business interests.

Today sees the ‘Orkney Food Company’ thriving in the continued production of delicious marinades that delicately flavour the herring but now under the family portfolio, with a variety of additions to the range, all of which are closely guarded Paterson family recipes!

Herring will always remain the mainstay of the company, a tradition in our family for four generations.

Name: Scanbio Marine Group
Description:
Scanbio Marine Group is established in Trondheim, Norway, with production facilities in Bjugn and Lysøysund and transport vessels along the Norwegian coast.

ScanBio is Norway’s leading logistics- and processing company of by-products from the aquaculture industry. Every day, we play a key role in the management of marine resources in Norway, like we have for 30 years. To ensure industry-leading capacity and emergency response services for our customers, we continue to make large investments in the silage solutions of tomorrow.

ScanBio is the safest partner, whether you need regular collection of K2 silage, delivery of acid, or need help handling challenging emergencies across several facilities and regions.

Ensuring that no resources are wasted require competent employees at all levels of the organization, cooperation, and world class logistics. Together, we reduce our environmental footprint and invest in an innovative and green aquaculture industry.

The fish waste we collect is recycled and transformed into new sustainable materials – raw materials used for production of bio energy and ingredients in new products. Every year, ScanBio contributes to environmentally friendly industrial products and 46 GW of bio energy, the equivalent of 1800 households.

Our services:
•	Biosecure collection of K2 silage
•	Regular delivery of acid
•	Emergency response services
•	Grinding directly from the cage
•	Emergency harvesting onboard mobile harvesting plants
•	Training in silage routines

Our products
•	Raw materials for biogas
•	Fish protein and oil for animal nutrition
•	Oil for chemical industry

RMK East Marine Denizcilik ve Turizm A.Ş.'nin bireysel müşterilerinin yanı sıra tersaneler, tekne ithalatçıları, bakım ve onarım servisleri vb. gibi kurumsal müşterileri de bulunmaktadır.

East Marine'in sürekli olarak gelişmekte olan ürün gamında, denizcilikle ilgili boya ve bakım, elektronik, navigasyon, güvenlik, demirleme ve rıhtım ürünleri, elektrik, tesisat, havalandırma, güverte donanımı, motor, tekne kılıfları, motor yedek parçaları, balıkçılık malzemeleri, kabin, aksesuar, hediyelik, su sporları, mutfak, yarış kıyafetleri, giyim, ayakkabı, yelken donanımı ve denizcilik yayınlarının da aralarında olduğu pek çok kategoride 20.000'in üzerinde ürün yer almaktadır. Kaliteyi uygun fiyatla sunan East Marine, ürün portföyünü müşterilerinin ihtiyaçları ve talepleri doğrultusunda sürekli olarak yenilemektedir.

Established in 2017, Protech Organo Foods Private Limited is a rapidly growing leader in the seafood export industry, dedicated to delivering premium-quality, safe, and sustainably sourced seafood. We also proudly hold certifications including BRCGS A-Grade, FSSC, FSMA, and FSSAI, reflecting our unwavering commitment to excellence. Our state-of-the-art facility is primed for USFDA registration, enabling us to expand our reach to the US market, adding to our existing global footprint across the EU, Japan, China, and other Asian countries.

With a total freezing capacity of 70 Metric tons per day and a storage capacity of over 2,000 tons, Protech Organo Foods boasts the infrastructure and expertise to process up to 125 tons of raw materials daily. We specialize in Raw IQF, Block-Frozen, and Blast-Frozen products tailored to meet each client's unique requirements. Our dynamic team of skilled professionals in procurement, processing, quality control, marketing, and finance is the driving force behind our commitment to excellence.

We believe in stringent quality control and streamlined supply chain management, ensuring that every product that leaves our facility symbolises superior quality and freshness. Protech Organo Foods is setting new standards in the seafood industry through innovation and precision, earning international recognition and trust.

Discover the ocean’s best with Protech Organo Foods Private Limited – where quality meets excellence, and every product is a promise of perfection.

Name: Diavena
Description:
Diavena. A third-generation responsible food cannery.

Letting someone prepare food for you requires trust. 
Trust is strongest when the producer and client share a similar understanding of quality.

Our understanding is simple: to act with conscience and responsibility. 
Every single day. For more than three decades.

We started in 1989 with a small family restaurant called Diavena, based in Shumen, where our production is still located. Three decades later, we continue to expand Diavena's business, preparing canned food for millions of people in Bulgaria and around the world. 

Safety and quality have always been our main priorities. The efforts of three generations have led to an efficient production process, tested throughout the years, and certified to the highest standards. We have taken our safety measures a step further by making it possible to trace the entire path of our products - from the fishing boat to the consumer basket. 

For three decades, we have believed in the principle of having principles and living up to them. That is why we: 
 
Take full responsibility
For our production, our relationships with our partners, and our impact on the environment. At the end of each day, our goal is to know that we have given our best. We are increasingly focusing our efforts on reducing our environmental impact. In fact, we produce 60% of the energy we use through photovoltaic panels. 

Take an individual approach to everyone we work with
We accommodate our partner's preferences by customizing our product offerings to their needs. 

Take pride in our family-owned company
This has defined us throughout all these years, and we have no intention of changing that. We believe in our capabilities and our journey so far proves it.

Name: Algaedonia
Description:
The start-up ALGAEDONIA 
Co-founded in March 2024 by Laura LAGOURGUE and Lydiane MATTIO, the start-up is developing a macroalgae production and value chain industry in New Caledonia. Its objectives are: 1) to ensure sustainable and eco-responsible production of local macroalgae, 2) to offer environmental bioremediation solutions using macroalgae, and 3) to promote the use of the biomass produced for the local market and export. 

Concept & innovation 
ALGAEDONIA develops innovative macroalgae production tools in integrated multi-trophic aquaculture (IMTA). According to this principle, aquaculture waters (or other effluents) loaded with nutrients are used to boost macroalgae production. The macroalgae biofilter and reoxygenate the water (bioremediation), thereby improving the quality of life for the livestock. By 2027, the start-up aims to roll out its production across several aquaculture concessions (mainly shrimp farms, in partnership). The biomass will be marketed for animal nutrition (particularly aquaculture), agriculture (production of natural fertilisers) and, in smaller volumes, for the development of high value-added products for food and cosmetics.

Name: AS Sævareid Fiskeanlegg
Description:
Innerst i idylliske Sævareidfjorden ligger Sævareid – et gammelt knutepunkt fra den tiden da fjorden og vannveiene var hovedferdselsårer, og fjellbøndene rodde ned til kysten. Her har naturkreftene satt sine tydelige spor gjennom tidene.

Siden etableringen i 1978 har AS Sævareid Fiskeanlegg vokst og utviklet seg i dette miljøet. Med fokus på kvalitet, bærekraft og tradisjon produserer vi i dag laksesmolt som er blant markedets mest etterspurte.

Anlegget vårt har nærmere 20.000 kubikkmeter karvolum på land, med rikelig tilførsel av ferskvann fra Skogseidvassdraget. Vannet kan hentes fra ulike dybder for å unngå ekstreme temperaturer, og utnyttes særlig i yngelfasen der laksens vekselvarme natur gir raskere vekst enn i vill tilstand.

Produksjonen skjer i et moderne anlegg der vi kombinerer gjennomstrømming, hybridløsninger og RAS-teknologi. Våre medarbeidere har lang og solid erfaring innen smoltproduksjon og anleggsdrift – en kompetanse vi er stolte av å videreføre inn i fremtidens havbruk.

AS Sævareid Fiskeanlegg er en del av AS Bolaks-konsernet, med Bolaks som største eier. Blant øvrige eiere finner vi også laksoppdretterne Lingalaks og Tombre.

Name: FOODIMAR
Description:
Sustainable climate-Friendly quality fOOD Ingredients from Marine side-stReams. 

FOODIMAR is dedicated to creating innovative, cost-effective, and climate-friendly methods to produce high-quality marine collagen, gelatin, and glycosaminoglycans (GAGs) from fisheries and aquaculture side-streams. With the smart valorization of these side-streams and promoting a circular economy, we aim to boost the physical and economic resilience of Europe's seafood value chains while ensuring environmental sustainability.

Our innovations surpass current standards and support further development, assessment, training, knowledge transfer, industry adoption, and job creation. In the long run, FOODIMAR will provide a clear, reproducible blueprint for sustainable, high-quality food solutions, ensuring food and nutrition security within our planet's limits. 

FOODIMAR started in May 2024 and will run for three years. We bring together 6 partners from 6 countries working across 3 sea basins.

Co-funded by the European Commission as part o the Sustainable Blue Economy Partnership 

Funding partners: Federal Ministry of Education and Research (DE), Jülich Forschungszentrum (DE), The Research Council of Norway (NO), Innovationsfonden (DK), FORMAS (SE), Tübitak (TK) and FWO (BE)

Name: Mangala Marine Exim India Private Limited
Description:

Quality is at the heart of our operations. We maintain dedicated laboratories for rigorous testing to meet the strict standards set by various countries. Our adherence to quality and safety is further validated by certifications from EU, FDA, BSCI, BRC, FSSAI, HACCP, FSSC 22000 and other relevant authorities. Our sourcing strategy encompasses both wild-caught and aquaculture farms, ensuring a broad and sustainable product offering. Mangala Marine Exim is approved for exports to major global markets, including the U.S.A, EU, Russia, China, Japan, UK, and several other Asian countries. Name: Al Jaraf Fisheries
Description:
Al Jaraf Fisheries stands as a formidable force within the aquaculture industry in the United  Arab Emirates (UAE), poised to ascend to preeminence across the Gulf Cooperation Council  (GCC) region. Our operations specialize in the cultivation of a diverse range of aquatic species  including Shrimps, Hamour, Tilapia, Seabass, and Seabream, predominantly through Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS) and land-based cage farms.
In the burgeoning landscape of commercial aquaculture in the UAE, our enterprise has emerged as a beacon of promise, exemplified by the ongoing production of 300-400 tons of  shrimps annually at our flagship farm, Barmid Island, Abu Dhabi. Additionally, our facilities  including Emirates Fish Farm at Al Wathba, Plant Farm in Ras Al Khaimah, and Sea Palace collectively yield an impressive annual production capacity of 400-500 tons of Grouper, Sea Bass, Sea Bream, and Tilapia.
Aligned with the dynamic growth trajectory of the UAE's aquaculture sector, Al Jaraf Fisheries  is committed to pioneering innovation, sustainability, and excellence in every facet of our  operations, solidifying our position as a trailblazer in the regional aquaculture landscape.

Name: Ideal Foods Ltd
Description:
Ideal Foods Ltd is a processor and specialist supplier of shellfish, whitefish, tuna, salmon heads and other fish by-products to companies all around the world including to the Far East.  We work with all areas of the market from local fishmongers to overseas supermarkets and from fish merchants to Blue Chip international manufacturers and processors.
 
Sustainability is at the very heart of Ideal Foods core values and the company strives to ensure that no parts of the fish go to waste.  Fish heads and other fish by-products are exported to Asia, supplying the large retailers in Vietnam, Thailand and the Philippines.  The frames, bellies, trimmings and offcuts are exported to the Ukraine, Poland and Latvia to name but a few.
 
The safest part of the fish, Ideal Foods supplies to Europe’s largest baby food manufacturers and the company has become a long standing and trusted supplier of fish that meets some of the strictest food safety specifications, in this highly regulated industry.
 
Five years ago, Ideal Foods launched its own pet food brand, ‘Purely Fish’, with a range of 100% natural treats, canned wet food, toppers and raw food for cats and dogs, all made from fish. 
 
Ideal Foods Head Office is located in Liskeard, Cornwall and its its processing factories and cold store are located in Grimsby.  The company also has satellite offices in Leighton Buzzard and Manila, in the Philippines.

Beltrán Adell | Over 40 Years of Quality and Trust from the Sea 

We are a family-owned company with a strong track record in the production and distribution of fresh and frozen seafood products. Since 1978, we have worked with passion and dedication to become a trusted name in the industry, combining tradition, innovation, and a deep commitment to quality.

Name: Ipswich Shellfish Group
Description:
Founded in 1935 on the North Shore of Massachusetts, Ipswich Shellfish Group (ISG) has been renowned for decades as a dynamic and innovative family-owned and operated business providing the freshest seafood to domestic and international clients. ISG maintains a prominent presence along the eastern seaboard with seven locations from Maine to South Carolina.
We provide all types of seafood, from shrimp to swordfish, scallops to seaweed, and, of course, the world-famous softshell Ipswich clams. ISG is the Atlantic coast’s preeminent purveyor of live lobsters, providing year-round delivery of top-quality crustaceans to local restaurants as well as abroad, to Europe and Asia. 
The group of companies upholds the highest level of food safety and quality and is certified by national and international food plant auditing firms such as NSF International or the Global Food Safety Initiative (GFSI) Safe Quality Food (SQF) Program. Further, the Ipswich Shellfish Group of companies holds Marine Stewardship Council (MSC) and Aquaculture Stewardship Council (ASC) Chain of Custody (CoC) certifications. 
Ipswich Shellfish Group has aligned with like-minded organizations and businesses working towards a more sustainable seafood industry. We are proud to be a founding member of Sea Pact, a group of leading North American seafood companies dedicated to driving stewardship and continuous improvement of social, economic, and environmental responsibility throughout the global seafood supply chain. 
ISG endeavors to build a diverse workforce including representation from a variety of skills, cultures, experiences, and perspectives.  Our organization is committed to striving for excellence and maintaining the company’s historic principals of integrity, values, and honesty. We remain dedicated to ensuring equal opportunity for all members of our workforce and encourage you to reach out if you are interested in joining our team.

Name: Brim Farm AS
Description:
Brim farm is a technology and service provider. The company has developed unique designs for floating enclosed fish cultivation. Our solution is a standardised and modularised design. It is a simple and safe design, yet robust and durable made in concrete by slip forming and has a lifetime up to 90 years. 

The solution resolves the main challenges the industry is facing:

1. Lice free production
2. No fish escapes 
3. Zero dangerous pollution
4. Safeguarding operators working conditions
 
The farm tank is suitable for operations in fjords and coastal locations and can easily be adapted to varying weather conditions.

There are a number of operational advantages, just to mention a few;
- Seawater supply in the entire water column with excessive capacity
- Protected deep and semi-deep seawater intakes
- Monitoring and control of feed consumption
- Smooth internal and external surfaces
- Gentle and effective unloading of fish through bottom while tank remains full of seawater
- Inclined bottom for effective drainage of sediments and extraction of feces and dead fish
- Fish escape proof (double barriers)
- Automatic tank cleaning system 
 
The unique features of Brim farm facilitates large scale serial production with considerable opportunity for local content.

Name: HAI VUONG GROUP
Description:
Hai Vuong Group is currently the largest processor and exporter of Tuna and pelagic fish products in Vietnam. 
 
In a year we export over 60,000MT of finished seafood products, including 50,000MT of tuna and pelagic fish products, to more than 50 countries & territories around the world.
 
In terms of capacity, our Group can process over 140,000MT of seafood, including almost 100,000MT of tuna and pelagic fish a year.
 
The Group’s main activities include processing, trading, marketing, and exporting products to many countries and territories worldwide, of which Europe, Americas, Asia, Middle-East & other countries. Our annual sales amount up to US$310M, including US$280M for tuna and pelagic products.
 
We import 90% of the raw materials from various sources globally, from both long line vessels and purse seine vessels in Taiwan, Korea, Japan, Fiji, Spain, etc., which are then treated and processed through to finished products with high added value. Therefore we create a broad value chain for our products, which is expected to further expand in the near future.
 
The management commits to supplying frozen fish products of highest quality to all international customers. This is accomplished by using raw materials directly frozen on fishing vessels equipped with deep-freezing facilities, thus eliminating any possible decomposition. In addition, we make sure all purchases of raw materials are made from reliable sources, taking into consideration the need for processing raw material in the safest manner.
 
Hai Vuong Group has a total staff of around 4,500 loyal and dedicated people, including 4,200 factory workers.

Name: Aqua4C / Omegabaars

Name: Nieddittas
Description:
La storia di Nieddittas inizia nel 1967 ad Arborea, in Sardegna, quando nove pescatori si riunirono per dare vita alla CPA Cooperativa Pescatori Arborea e valorizzare le cozze e il pescato offerti dal mare. Il risultato è stato quello di creare tante opportunità per i collaboratori che, nel tempo, hanno affiancato i soci fondatori. 

In oltre 50 anni di vita la piccola cooperativa è cresciuta fini a diventare una delle aziende più importanti d’Italia nel proprio settore, capace di proporre al mercato un prodotto certificato per tutta la filiera.

Commercializziamo i nostri prodotti con il marchio “NIEDDITTAS”: un nome che i consumatori in tutta Italia hanno imparato a conoscere ed apprezzare e che è diventato sinonimo di prodotti di altissima qualità.

Name: UNIFRIGO GADUS S.p.A.
Description:
Pensiamo come una start-up, con 150 anni di esperienza.
Siamo fra le più importanti aziende italiane di importazione e distribuzione di prodotti ittici conservati. Grazie a 2 stabilimenti produttivi, 2 uffici commerciali interni e 45 agenti su tutto il territorio, serviamo più di 2.000 clienti in Italia fra Retail, sia GDO che Normal Trade, e Ho.Re.Ca.,

La nostra storia inizia nel 1878 con l’importazione e la lavorazione di baccalà e stoccafisso ma col tempo abbiamo ampliato la nostra offerta, dal tonno allo sgombro, dalle acciughe alle aringhe e molto altro.
Alla guida della nostra azienda, oggi, c’è la sesta generazione della famiglia Eminente, una delle fondatrici di Unifrigo Gadus. È con l’ingresso di questa generazione che abbiamo scelto di rinnovare la nostra gamma di prodotti e l’immagine dei nostri brand storici, Marca Scudo Genova ed Excelsior.

Non offriamo solo delle ottime conserve ittiche, portiamo ai nostri clienti il vantaggio di avere a scaffale esperienza, aggiornamento continuo dell’assortimento, campagne di comunicazione mirate e dinamicità. Questo significa pensare come una start-up, da 150 anni.

Our company has played an active part in developing the Norwegian seafood industry, both in fishery and processing from the late 1960s and salmon farming from the 1980s.

We are today dedicated to the same values that have been driving us since the start - high-quality Products, predictability  - and a high level of service.

Efficient logistics, quality certifications, and a dedicated and hands-on staff. Ensure that our customers get the product they expect. This also includes full traceability and at least responsible and sustainable operation and sourcing.

End 2019 AS Aalesundfisk became part of Aalesundfisk Holding, forming a verical Integrated value Chain - from Sea to end customers. Aalesundfisk Holding also have part ownership in Fishing vessels and full ownership in two land-based operations in Vardø and Skarsvåg.  AS Aalesundfisk is then the sales part in the vertical Integrated value Chain.

Oltre 50 anni di esperienza nel settore ittico con prodotti di alta qualità e certificati dalle più grandi aziende europee.

Verona. Qui inizia la storia di Graziano Ferretto. 
Città scelta per la posizione strategica a vantaggio di spostamenti e contatti tra Italia ed Europa.
Dagli inizi degli anni 70 Graziano Ferretto si è occupato, con mansioni dirigenziali, dell’azienda Ferpesca, leader nazionale e internazionale della pesca e della distribuzione nel settore ittico, gestendo l’import export di pesce fresco e congelato nei più grandi mercati italiani ed esteri.

La lunga esperienza maturata gli hanno consentito di acquisire delle speciali competenze ed una grande professionalità tale da fondare nel 1992 la ditta Individuale GRAZIANO FERRETTO ITTICA, diventando con grande genialità uno dei broker di prodotti ittici freschi più conosciuto in Italia e in Europa.

Graziano Ferretto è stato mente-cuore-braccia dell'azienda, e ogni giorno con la sua esperienza e la sua audacia ha motivato i suoi collaboratori.

La ditta rappresenta il vasto mercato ittico estero ai grossisti italiani, collaborando con i fornitori più qualificati per la gestione della qualità dei prodotti e dei prezzi.

Da Febbraio 2024 la GRAZIANO FERRETTO ITTICA è guidata da Federica Ferretto, figlia di Graziano, che ispirata dal suo lavoro si dedica al continuo sviluppo e all'espansione dell'azienda in nuovi segmenti di mercato.

Our team of seafood experts is passionate about providing exceptional service and ensuring that our customers receive only the best. Name: Göteborgs Fiskauktion
Description:
Välkommen till Göteborgs Fiskauktion, Sveriges största av sitt slag. 

I mer än 100 år har det bedrivits handel på samma plats i Fiskhamnen i Göteborg. Då, för 100 år sedan vimlade det av små fiskebåtar som lossade sin fångst på kajen i hamnen. Idag landas fortsatt fisk varje dag med båt och vi har ca 1300 anlöp per år men en stor del fisk och skaldjur levereras också med lastbil som hämtat fångster från olika uppsamlingsplatser runt vår kust. 

Idag sker auktionen i vår kylda auktionshall som fylls på under natten med fisk och skaldjur från såväl svenska, norska och danska fiskebåtar. Varje dag, måndag till fredag ropas lådor med räka, kräfta, torsk, kolja, gös och andra förstklassiga råvaror ut. Väder, kvoter och efterfrågan bestämmer priset.

Name: OCEAN SELECT SEAFOOD LLC
Description:
Bought by the Guidry family in 1991, Ocean Select is a natural extension of our original – and still very successful – family business, Guidry’s Catfish, which was founded in 1976. Ocean Select gave us the opportunity to offer more products, expand our production capacity and grow our service area. What began with just a few employees and a single delivery truck when we first purchased Ocean Select has grown into a large business capable of producing over 60,000 pounds of product a day.

Our passion since 1991 is to build strong customer relationships through honest business practices, a knowledgeable, friendly and helpful customer service team, and outstanding products at competitive prices.

Ocean Select produces some of the best tasting seafood Louisiana has to offer, including our well-known brand, Louisiana Select Foods, a trusted name in frozen seafood. Whether its Gulf shrimp, Louisiana grown crawfish or U.S. farm raised catfish, our premium seafood products are the freshest around.

We offer products tailored to the retail as well as the food service industries, and currently serve over 1500 customers in the Southeast region of the United States. Our vision is to continue expanding across the country by reinvesting in our people, products and innovative technology.

Name: UAB KINTAI

Esame žuvies profesionalai – AUGINAME · PERDIRBAME · PARDUODAME. 

UAB KINTAI – unikalios vietovės įkvėptas verslas, įsikūręs Nemuno deltos regioniniame parke. Čia, 600 ha ploto, Minijos vandeniu užpildytų tvenkinių teritorijoje, daugiau nei 30 metų vykdome akvakultūros veiklą, kuri apima žuvies veisimą, auginimą, perdirbimą ir pardavimą. Tai šeimos verslas, kuriame susilieja dviejų kartų stiprybės – ilgametė patirtis ir modernus požiūris į verslą. 

Aukščiausią prioritetą teikiame mūsų produkcijos kokybei ir šviežumui, tad nuolatos modernizuojame gamybą, taip pat kuriame, naujus, tendencijas atitinkančius ir į kliento poreikius orientuotus produktus. 

„Kintų“ asortimente – ne tik mūsų tvenkiniuose užauginta žuvis, bet ir platus upių ir jūrų žuvų bei jūros gėrybių spektras: švieži atvėsinti, rūkyti, sūdyti ir šaldyti gaminiai, kuriuos tiekiame didiesiems Baltijos šalių prekybos tinklams – „Maxima“, „Rimi“, „IKI“, „PROMO Cash&Carry“, taip pat ir eksportuojame.
Location: Povilų k., Kintų mst., Šilutės r. sav.

Name: Sjøsaker AS
Description:
At Sjøsaker, we make spice blends straight from the sea – literally. We take Norwegian seaweed, sustainably harvested from our wild and beautiful coastline, and turn it into flavorful, nutritious seasonings for everyday cooking.

Seaweed is more than just ocean greens – it's a true superfood. Packed with natural umami, iodine, vitamins and minerals. It grows without soil, freshwater or fertilizer, and cleans the ocean as it grows. We love it – for its taste, nutrition, and climate-positive impact.

We started Sjøsaker because we saw a need for modern, healthy and sustainable spice alternatives that didn’t compromise on flavor. Today, we make everything from sea salt and taco mix to furikake and grill blends – all powered by Norwegian seaweed.

Our philosophy is simple:
 More flavor, less salt
 Food that’s good for you – and the ocean
 Locally made with roots in the Norwegian coast

We’re on a mission to make seaweed familiar, accessible and delicious – one jar at a time.

 Based in Norway, with a deep love for the sea.

Acipenser gueldenstaedtii,

¿Buscas elevar tu experiencia culinaria? En Tostado Premium, hemos perfeccionado el arte de crear productos de atún de calidad gourmet premium desde la hermosa costa de Mazatlán hasta tu mesa. Nuestra pasión por la calidad y la frescura nos ha convertido en líderes indiscutibles en la elaboración y envasado al alto vacío de productos de atún de alta gama.

 Mazatlán: Cuna de los Tesoros Marinos: Nuestra ubicación en Mazatlán, un paraíso costero, nos brinda acceso a los tesoros marinos más exquisitos. Operamos en armonía con la naturaleza, adoptando prácticas de pesca sostenible que garantizan la preservación de nuestros recursos marinos y el futuro de esta industria.

 Compromiso Inquebrantable con la Calidad: La calidad es la base de todo lo que hacemos en Tostado Premium. Cada paso de nuestro proceso, desde la cuidadosa selección de los peces hasta el meticuloso proceso de elaboración y envasado, está diseñado para mantener los estándares más exigentes. El resultado es un atún con una textura incomparable y un sabor que supera cualquier expectativa.

 Venta al Mayoreo: Comprendemos las necesidades de tu negocio y estamos aquí para satisfacerlas. Nuestra venta al mayoreo está diseñada para restaurantes, tiendas gourmet, hoteles y distribuidores que buscan ofrecer productos de atún gourmet premium a sus clientes. Trabajar con nosotros significa acceso a una amplia gama de productos excepcionales que mejorarán tu reputación culinaria.

 Pasión por la Excelencia: En Tostado Premium, perseguimos la excelencia en cada detalle. Desde la selección de los ingredientes más frescos hasta la presentación final en envases al alto vacío que garantizan la máxima frescura, nuestra dedicación es evidente en cada producto que ofrecemos.

 **Únete a Nuestra Misión**: Te invitamos a unirte a nosotros en nuestra misión de llevar el atún gourmet a nuevas alturas. Juntos, podemos crear experiencias culinarias memorables y deleitar los paladares más exigentes.
