Name: FARO S.R.L.
Description:
UN MARE DI ESPERIENZA DAL 1950
Oltre sessant’ anni di storia, durante i quali la vita di tre generazioni di due famiglie si sono intrecciate con il mare di Cecina e Vada. L’attività  nel settore della pesca, inizia dopo la fine della guerra, con il commercio ambulante del pesce fresco locale .  A metà degli anni ’60 con l’avvento delle nuove tecniche del freddo per la conservazione dei prodotti ittici, nasce la società Faccini e Rocchi sdf, adibita al commercio all’ ingrosso di pesce fresco e di pesce congelato di provenienza nazionale. Da qui è nata nel 1994 la FARO srl. Una moderna azienda, specializzata nella lavorazione e nel commercio di prodotti ittici freschi e congelati, che oggi è guidata dai figli dei due soci fondatori Faccini e Rocchi, che insieme  ad uno staff di qualificati collaboratori, riesce a garantire elevati standard di qualità, avvalendosi di rapporti diretti, con i produttori primari di tutta Italia. 
L’ efficienza di una organizzazione e una decennale esperienza gestionale, permette quotidianamente di offrire sul mercato prodotti di qualità a prezzi convenienti. Il sapore del mare
Obbiettivi di FARO sono quelli di operare nel mercato ittico secondo i principi di qualità e responsabilità.
Obiettivo di fondo è portare sulle vostre tavole i sapori del mare, con una particolare attenzione alla provenienza dei prodotti e alla salute del consumatore, valori che rappresentano i fattori strategici e identificativi della crescita di FARO. 
FARO è da sempre profondamente legata al mar Tirreno e Ligure, che offre quotidianamente pesce di eccellente qualità e sapore. Per questo motivo, l' azienda ha rapporti personali diretti con pescatori locali e fornitori che operano sul litorale. Il pescato locale, ritirato giornalmente o consegnato direttamente presso lo stabilimento, garantisce un prodotto di elevati standard per qualità e sicurezza alimentare. 
FARO, commercializza anche  pescato di importazione, proveniente da località sparse per l'intero globo.

Join us on this remarkable journey, where sustainability meets exceptional taste. Üretim sistemi, dünya standartlarında kaliteli ürünlerin fabrikada üretimini sağlayan gelişmiş otomatik montaj hattında uygulanmaktadır.

HIDEA'nın dıştan takma motorlarının ömrünün endüstride uluslararası standartlara ulaştığı kanıtlanmıştır.

HIDEA’nın mevcut ürün yelpazesi iki zamanlı motorlar serisi, dört zamanlı motorlar serisi, Enduro serisi ve EFI serisi dıştan takma motorları içerir. Tüm ürünlerimiz tesisimizde geliştirilmiş ve üretilmiştir. Bu ürünlerin %70'i AB, Kuzey Amerika ve diğer gelişmiş ülke ve bölgelere ihraç edilmiştir. HIDEA’nın dıştan takmalı motorları, güvenilir kalite ve iyi kurulmuş satış sonrası destek ile birlikte dünya çapında büyük bir üne sahiptir.

HIDEA, ISO9001 uluslararası kalite sistem belgesi, Çin CCS sertifikası, ABD EPA sertifikası ve AB CE sertifikası onaylarından geçmiştir. HIDEA ayrıca Zhejiang Dıştan Takma Motor Araştırma Merkezi tarafından kurumsal olarak onur ödülleri almıştır. Bununla birlikte, HIDEA Çin'de dıştan takma motorun endüstriyel standardının belirlenmesi çalışmalarına da katılmaktadır.

HIDEA, profesyonel araştırma ve geliştirme ekibi ile her zaman denizde kaliteli yaşam tarzını geliştirmek ve doğa dostu yeşil güç ürünleri geliştirmek için çalışmalarını devam ettirmektedir.

Name: Reel Filletz
Description:
Reel Filletz was founded in 2016 with the mission to provide anglers with a sustainable framework for fishing, filleting their catch, and cooking it. We are a small organization founded by anglers and fishmongers who understand that for this sacred art to continue for generations to come, we must not be greedy. Keep what you need, release what you don't! Marine conservation is at the heart of our industry's future and we proudly support individuals, brands, charter captains, and anglers who prioritize it.

Filleting fish is truly an art dating back thousands of years when humans were first learning best fishing practices. As homo sapiens evolved and developed better tools, they also were able to refine their cooking practices. As knives entered the marketplace, filleting fish and cutting meat became much easier; this ultimately lead to a healthier selection of the fish to cut and cook. We carry on this tradition in today's age by showcasing the best fillet methods for hundred of different species of fish.

Name: Seakol Biopharm pvt ltd
Description:
Alginic acid, being insoluble in water, cannot act as a thickener or gelling agent on its own. To dissolve it in water, an alkali must be added to neutralize it.

When alginic acid forms salts with monovalent cations like sodium (Na) or potassium (K), it becomes soluble. However, it becomes insoluble when it forms salts with polyvalent cations such as calcium (Ca) or iron (Fe).

Though alginic acid doesn’t dissolve in water naturally, special processing methods can produce a type of alginic acid that readily absorbs water and swells.

Name: Tsushima Suisan Co., Ltd.
Description:
Japanese Cuisine (Washoku) is since 2013 included on the list of UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage. The reason for the recognition by the committee is made clear by the following quote
“[…] with an essential spirit of respect for nature that is closely related to the sustainable use of natural resources.”
This recognition has significantly increased the pressure on Japan to achieve a sustainable consumer economy for future generations.
For example, Unagi is since 2013 in Japan on the Red List and as counter reaction of the populations Unagi-consumption, import of surrounding Asian countries have risen. The ideal of the UNESCO shows domestically a different face than officially acclaimed. 
Tsushima Suisan sees its role in the future as a provider of domestic cultural seafood with sustainable fishing methods. Washoku needs its original resources to provide the authentic taste, which makes Japanese cuisine so famous in the first place. Unagi is with prospect of recovery still a far away of being wild caught for commercial use. Anago (Unagis cousin) is also used in plenty similar dishes as its relative. The difference is, that it is still abundant in the depths of Tsushima in Nagasaki. To keep it a reliable source for Japanese dishes, we will do anything to protect this prosperity of taste. 
Due to the pricing of wild, suitable caught Anago, cheaper imports are making our business domestically challenging. To use this situation for the better, we focus on the vast Cuisines around the world to promote our products and our way of sustainable fishing, and discover new taste experiences for our native fish.
Location: Senri-Chuo Twin Building Annex 2F  Shinsenri-Nishimachi 1-1-4,, Toyonaka-Shi, Osaka Prefecture,

Name: TRE-FIN GROUP, LLC
Description:
Tre-Fin Seafood is a regionally focused seafood buyer and processor based in Ilwaco, WA. For over 11 years, we’ve been dedicated to sourcing and distributing high-quality, locally caught seafood through both direct-to-consumer and wholesale channels.

As part of our continued commitment to regional sustainability and community-based fisheries, we developed an offload station/dock in Chinook, WA to support our recently expanded fish processing plant in Ilwaco. These developments significantly enhance our ability to support local commercial fishermen with year-round services, including processing, offloading, and logistics.

To further strengthen our capabilities, we have partnered with broader markets and logistical infrastructure, allowing us to support larger-volume production across multiple fisheries. 

We are now positioned to build and support a small but resilient fleet of year-round commercial fishermen supporting our community. Our goal is to become a steadfast conduit—from offload to processing and distribution—that helps sustain the livelihoods of local fishers while bringing high quality, traceable seafood to markets worldwide.

Name: Caspiran Caviar
Description:
Caspiran Caviar, the brand name of Toranj Javid Pars LLC, stands as a beacon of grandeur and elegance in Iran's caviar industry. Drawing from the rich history and culture of ancient Persia and harnessing the country's unparalleled natural resources, our company embarked on its esteemed journey in 2010, continuously striving to elevate its stature in international markets.
In 2017, with the inauguration of our first sturgeon farm in Gilan Province, Caspiran Caviar officially entered the domain of sturgeon farming. By 2018, we proudly began producing premium Iranian caviar and exporting it to global markets, marking a significant and proud leap towards our ambitious goals. Today, we proudly export Iranian caviar to the European Union, Canada, the United Kingdom, Latin America, Southeast Asia, and the Persian Gulf region, equipped with all necessary certifications, including CITES permits and veterinary health certificates.

Since 2021, we have further enhanced our supply chain by initiating the breeding of sturgeon. Under the Caspiran Caviar brand since 2019, we have also expanded into the production and export of other marine products such as sturgeon meat, smoked beluga, trout meat, and trout roe. Additionally, we have strengthened our domestic distribution network and provincial representation of these products.

Caspiran Caviar serves as a robust bridge between Iranian culture and quality and global markets, with exclusive representatives in numerous prestigious countries, including Switzerland, Australia, and France. In 2024, with the establishment of our new office in Dubai, our presence in the Middle East region was further solidified. This office also serves as a hub for fostering commercial and cultural relations with other countries.

Name: Aurora Ghana
Description:
Aurora is a company in Accra importing and distributing fresh and frozen Seafood in Ghana. Our roots however are in Europe and all imported Seafood comes from Europe. The most important reason for choosing to 
operate like this is that the food safety measures in Europe are among the highest in the world. All food products imported and produced in the European Community should have a European license (EU) number. The same policy is applicable for storing Food products.With a long history and experience in Europe 
Aurora knows exactly where to buy all different Seafood. We deliver a wide range of seafood, from life Lobsters to frozen Pangasius fillet. In this way we cover market demands and needs; everybody can buy with us.

We chose to organize our import like this as from Amsterdam daily flights operate to Accra. All fresh and live Seafood is packed and repacked in Holland to secure the best quality and the shortest delivery times to ensure freshness.
Frozen containers are coming to Tema every month. We consolidate all frozen Seafood in a Dutch warehouse from the goods are loaded in a container, inspected by official inspectors from the 
government prior to departure. Sailing time is approximately 16/20 days.

Name: Pezcol Sea Food S.A.S
Description:
Pezcol es una empresa colombiana ubicada en Aguadita, Cundinamarca, especializada en la producción y exportación de trucha arcoíris de alta calidad. Nacemos como una extensión natural de Truchas Ávila, una marca con más de 10 años de experiencia, reconocida por su frescura y procesos rigurosos.

Con un firme compromiso con la sostenibilidad y la excelencia, en Pezcol llevamos este legado al mercado internacional, garantizando productos frescos, seguros y con un sabor excepcional. Atendemos a restaurantes, pescaderías, distribuidores y hogares colombianos, consolidándonos como un referente del sector acuícola en Colombia.

Name: Mpogo Ocean Ranching Limited
Description:
Mpogo Ocean Ranching Limited is dedicated to sustainable aquaculture and responsible seafood production in the Mafia region of East Africa. Our offerings include breeding sea cucumbers, cultivating sea moss, farming squid and mud crabs, operating commercial fisheries, and providing a variety of premium seafood products.
We focus on quality assurance through fish processing, cold chain management, and supplying fishing equipment. Additionally, the company engages in complementary activities such as ice making and sales, cereal trading to support local economies, and operating a marine hatchery center for marine conservation.
We emphasize environmental stewardship, community development, and excellence in aquaculture.

Name: Dfresh Seafood
Description:
About Us
At Dfresh Seafood, we are proud to be Pakistan’s No. 1 name in the online seafood industry. We are leading the way in redefining how fresh seafood reaches both consumers and businesses nationwide.

With our own launches and direct sourcing from the ocean, we guarantee premium quality, unmatched freshness, and complete reliability. Our commitment to excellence has made us the most trusted choice for restaurants, caterers, and seafood lovers across Pakistan.

From daily fresh catch to premium marinated products, we don’t just deliver seafood — we set the standard for the industry.

We proudly serve not only households through our online seafood delivery service, but also partner with restaurants, clubs, marts, and catering services nationwide. By bridging the gap between seafood lovers and authentic fresh catch, Dfresh Seafood is setting new standards of quality, hygiene, and trust in the industry.

What We Offer:

Direct-from-sea freshness with our own launches 

Wide variety: shrimp, fish, lobster, crab, mussels & more 

Online delivery for households across Pakistan 

Reliable bulk supply for restaurants, clubs, marts, and caterers 

Hygienic processing & safe packaging every step of the way 


Our Mission:
To eliminate the gap between seafood lovers and the freshest catch, making premium seafood accessible to every home and business in Pakistan.

Name: CAMAU SEAFOOD PROCESSING and SERVICE JOINT-STOCK CORPORATION (CASES)
Description:
CA MAU SEAFOOD PROCESSING AND SERVICE JSC (CASES) is a Top 5 seafood exporter in Vietnam, operating 5 factories with annual output of ~30,000 tons and turnover of ~USD 200 million.

Established in 1996 and converted to a joint-stock company in 2016, CASES has over 20 years of industry experience.

Core products include Black Tiger & Vannamei shrimp, surimi, cephalopods, and value-added seafood.

EU-approved factories: DL113, DL809, DL51, DL295, DL835, equipped with IQF lines and cold storage.

Certifications: HACCP, ISO 22000, BRC, ASC, BAP, MSC, Organic, IFS, HALAL, SMETA.

Shrimp portfolio covers raw, cooked, semi-processed and value-added formats; surimi capacity reaches 15,000 tons/year.

Annual shrimp capacity includes ASC, BAP and Organic Black Tiger & Vannamei programs.

Total workforce: ~3,000 employees, supported by advanced QA & full traceability systems.

Main export markets include Europe, Korea, Australia, China and Thailand, supplying retailers and foodservice partners.

Head office: Ca Mau, Vietnam
Person in charge of the project: Grace Nguyen
